textByHash.cce95875358a13755612889241ecd8c2e296d344: Well, maybe I do, but you need to prove yourself worthy as a White Knight before I will sell you anything.
textByHash.fc9cb112f6e006f9d5ba6b7ace317eae430f73e3: Kill Black Knights and make sure you don't kill any White Knights!
textByHash.1f165a6197370127db0793f93c5f245c45d439de: You are currently at Novice level within the White Knights, so your access to equipment is limited.
textByHash.835a64b84ac7776d5f0aa2296f05625806cb5d69: I can sell you a White Knight Chainmail body for 1440 coins, and White Platemail legs for 1920 coins.
textByHash.c44dab88c1a633d317aa545e244eeea8559b0043: You are at Peon level within the White Knights, not much to choose from I'm afraid.
textByHash.1d84dac06d07d11b2a18f156aaca690a98492671: You've reached Page level, that shows a bit of dedication you know! Your available equipment will reflect that!
textByHash.6f50f7e1e882a27b85c67f134dc0569cd84c340a: And may I say what a pleasure it is to serve any Knight who has achieved Noble level!
textByHash.3c268e57414fa7c8dfb392bcb14fe1e1b0f0ba9e: And it is so very rare that I see any White Knight who has reached Adept level!
textByHash.7233714d100956625b04ceb0dcdaacdad2230cfc: Well of course! I AM the White Knights armourer after all!
textByHash.28ce4d2e0dac54b83718c2c76b724f4047e6890a: And for a dedicated White Knight to have reached Master level like yourself, you get only the very best of all equipment available!
textByHash.2e164c588bbe8c47d7c7a840d912698ac875af96: We are the White Knights of Falador. We are the most powerful order of knights in the land. We are helping the king Vallance rule the kingdom as he is getting old and tired.
textByHash.e6bc0d48b5909105dd3b084dbecbe5695350ec6c: I'm... not sure what you're asking me... you want to join the White Knights?
textByHash.0fff23deb3da606db7ea7369b3ea9caa5b1fda31: ... ...I don't think I want to talk to you anymore.
textByHash.447c3cc97b7a19d6c2b5938e71d2fb5d4abcebd7: Excellent work! I have new information to share with you.
textByHash.63e33dfdfab0ec98193f87a699193f41b9e3a197: You're not done yet! Do this for me!
textByHash.6080b4cfe1df5e73daa8710c838b0f818511bf38: The black knights can do puzzles better than that!
textByHash.e409adf6c06546ef613c9e4936ef7b2370873952: Your commitment to the white knights is fantastic .
